VitalEdge Program

Revolutionary employee benefits solution that combines the VitalEdge wellness program with SB/A MVP Health Plans to create a comprehensive, cost-effective benefits package that attracts and retains top talent.

Learn More Get Quote

Program Highlights

Comprehensive Wellness Platform

24/7 access to health and wellness resources

SB/A MVP Health Plans

ACA-compliant minimum value plans

Cost-Effective Solution

Affordable benefits that meet compliance requirements

Employee Engagement

Tools to improve workforce health and productivity

Get Your VitalEdge Program Quote

What is the VitalEdge Program?

VitalEdge is a comprehensive employee wellness and benefits solution that combines cutting-edge wellness technology with affordable health insurance coverage.

Complete Wellness Platform

VitalEdge provides your employees with 24/7 access to a comprehensive wellness platform that includes health assessments, personalized wellness plans, fitness tracking, mental health resources, and preventive care tools.

Health Risk Assessments

Comprehensive health screenings and risk evaluations

Personalized Wellness Plans

Customized health and fitness programs for each employee

Mental Health Support

Access to mental health resources and counseling services

Fitness & Nutrition Tracking

Tools to monitor and improve physical health and nutrition

Employee Benefits

  • Improved health outcomes
  • Reduced healthcare costs
  • Increased productivity
  • Better work-life balance
  • Enhanced job satisfaction

Paired with SB/A MVP Health Plans

The VitalEdge program is now integrated with SB/A Minimum Value Plans (MVP), providing a complete benefits solution that meets ACA requirements while keeping costs manageable.

SB/A MVP Health Plans

Minimum Value Plans (MVP) that meet ACA compliance requirements while providing essential health benefits at affordable rates.

Meets 60% minimum actuarial value
ACA employer mandate compliance
Essential health benefits included
Preventive care coverage
Prescription drug benefits

VitalEdge Wellness Platform

Advanced wellness technology that empowers employees to take control of their health while helping employers reduce healthcare costs.

Biometric screenings and health assessments
Personalized health coaching
Wellness challenges and incentives
Telehealth and virtual care options
Chronic disease management programs

Benefits for Employers and Employees

The VitalEdge program creates value for both employers and employees through improved health outcomes and cost management.

Employer Benefits

Reduced Healthcare Costs

Proactive wellness programs help prevent costly chronic conditions

Improved Productivity

Healthier employees are more engaged and productive

Reduced Absenteeism

Wellness programs lead to fewer sick days and health-related absences

Enhanced Recruitment

Comprehensive benefits package attracts top talent

ACA Compliance

Meets employer mandate requirements with affordable coverage

Data-Driven Insights

Analytics to track program effectiveness and ROI

Employee Benefits

Comprehensive Health Coverage

Essential health benefits with preventive care at no cost

24/7 Wellness Support

Round-the-clock access to health and wellness resources

Personalized Health Plans

Customized wellness programs based on individual health needs

Mental Health Resources

Access to counseling, stress management, and mental wellness tools

Fitness and Nutrition Support

Tools and resources to maintain physical health and proper nutrition

Incentive Programs

Rewards for participating in wellness activities and achieving health goals

VitalEdge Platform Features

Comprehensive wellness tools and resources designed to improve employee health and engagement.

Health Risk Assessments

Comprehensive health screenings that identify risk factors and provide personalized recommendations for improvement.

  • • Biometric screenings
  • • Health questionnaires
  • • Risk stratification
  • • Personalized action plans

Personal Health Coaching

One-on-one coaching with certified health professionals to help employees achieve their wellness goals.

  • • Certified health coaches
  • • Goal setting and tracking
  • • Behavioral change support
  • • Regular check-ins and accountability

Digital Health Tools

Mobile app and web platform with comprehensive health tracking and management capabilities.

  • • Mobile health app
  • • Activity and fitness tracking
  • • Nutrition logging
  • • Health metrics dashboard

Mental Health & Wellbeing

Comprehensive mental health support including stress management, counseling services, and emotional wellness resources.

  • • Stress management programs
  • • Mental health counseling
  • • Mindfulness and meditation
  • • Work-life balance resources

Preventive Care Focus

Emphasis on preventive care and early intervention to maintain health and prevent serious conditions.

  • • Annual wellness exams
  • • Preventive screenings
  • • Immunizations
  • • Early intervention programs

Chronic Disease Management

Specialized programs for employees with chronic conditions like diabetes, hypertension, and heart disease.

  • • Disease-specific programs
  • • Medication management
  • • Regular monitoring
  • • Lifestyle modification support

How VitalEdge Works

Simple implementation process that gets your employees engaged in wellness from day one.

1

Assessment

Employees complete comprehensive health risk assessments to establish baseline health metrics.

2

Personalization

Custom wellness plans are created based on individual health needs, goals, and preferences.

3

Engagement

Employees participate in wellness activities, challenges, and coaching sessions through the platform.

4

Results

Track progress, measure outcomes, and celebrate achievements while reducing healthcare costs.

Proven Results and ROI

VitalEdge programs deliver measurable results for both employee health and business outcomes.

25%
Reduction in Healthcare Costs
Average over 3 years
40%
Decrease in Absenteeism
Health-related absences
85%
Employee Participation
In wellness activities
3:1
Return on Investment
For every dollar invested

Health Outcome Improvements

Cardiovascular Health

Improved blood pressure, cholesterol levels, and heart health metrics

Weight Management

Sustainable weight loss and improved body composition through lifestyle changes

Stress Reduction

Lower stress levels and improved mental wellbeing through targeted interventions

Simple Implementation Process

Getting started with VitalEdge is straightforward and can be customized to fit your organization's needs and timeline.

Week 1-2: Planning & Setup

Initial consultation, program customization, and platform configuration

Week 3-4: Employee Enrollment

Employee onboarding, health assessments, and initial wellness plan creation

Month 2: Program Launch

Full program activation with coaching, challenges, and ongoing support

Ongoing: Monitoring & Optimization

Regular reporting, program adjustments, and continuous improvement

VitalEdge Program Options

Flexible program options designed to meet the needs and budgets of businesses of all sizes.

Essential

Perfect for small businesses getting started with wellness

Health risk assessments
Basic wellness platform access
SB/A MVP health plan integration
Monthly wellness challenges
Basic reporting and analytics

Why Choose VitalEdge with PCFG Insurance?

Our expertise in employee benefits combined with cutting-edge wellness technology creates unmatched value for your organization.

Benefits Expertise

Over 5 years of experience designing and implementing employee benefits programs across 15 states.

Cutting-Edge Technology

State-of-the-art wellness platform with proven results and high employee engagement rates.

Dedicated Support

Personal account management and ongoing support to ensure program success and maximum ROI.

Success Stories

See how organizations like yours have transformed their employee benefits and wellness outcomes with VitalEdge.

150 employees
